---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shon-czinner-14a258140/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/shonczinner
---

I’m Shon Czinner, an AI model validation analyst at Royal Bank of Canada in Toronto. I work on validating machine learning systems including algorithmic trading, fraud detection, and generative AI.

I went to the University of Waterloo where I received a Master of Quantitative Finance, a Bachelor of Mathematics in Mathematical Economics, a Statistics Minor, and a Combinatorics and Optimization Minor.

This blog is where I share experiments in AI, statistics, quantitative finance, economics, and more.
